programmes.show_description: Thriller with Melissa George. A reporter's life unravels when she misses a chance to stop a notorious serial killer. But as she tries to move on, someone isn't ready to forgive and forget (2010).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Slick thriller starring Sarah Lancaster. A bride's dream home turns into a nightmare when her tech billionaire husband's shady past won't stay buried (2005).
The Heist: Suspicion falls upon two missing crew members when an armoured car carrying $2m disappears. Meanwhile, Lucy feels left out when Sue's college friend comes to stay.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
A Passion for Murder: Dr Sloan becomes embroiled in a murder investigation when the wife of the hospital's chief of staff is shot dead.
Poisoned In Paradise: When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about? (2021)
School For Murder: Can Jessica discover who killed the new headmaster of a Cabot Cove prep school?
Another Killing In Cork: Can Jessica help to prove her friend's innocence during her stay at his fishing lodge in Ireland?
Game, Set, Murder: Can Jessica help a young tennis player haunted by disturbing visions?
Nailed: Jessica investigates the murder of a financier whose body is found in her friend's fashionable beauty salon.
A Quaking In Aspen: Jessica investigates the suspicious death of her friend's husband during a trip to Aspen, Colorado. Can she and Charlie Garret unearth the truth?
The Secret Of Gila Junction: Jessica helps an inexperienced sheriff investigate a major crime spree in a small town in Arizona.
Big Easy Murder: Jessica investigates a series of murders during a research trip to New Orleans.
Home Care: Jessica's return to Cabot Cove is marred by a personal tragedy.
Nan's Ghost Part 1: Will a ghost story lead Jessica to danger or ancient treasure during a trip to Ireland? Part 1 of 2.
Nan's Ghost Part 2: Concluding episode. Can Jessica escape the prison of Ballynook Castle and find a murderer? Part 2 of 2.
...Death At The Diner: Aurora's investigation strays a little too close to home when the owner of the diner she works in is killed and her boyfriend is the main suspect. (2024)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Ground: Heartfelt mystery starring Eric Mabius. The Postables race against time to reunite two lovers, all while navigating personal challenges and the aftermath of Hurricane Katrina. (2017)

Thriller with Alicia Ziegler. Katie's marriage is put to the test when her husband's obsessed ex-girlfriend moves in next door. The question is, who's going to finish it once and for all? (2019)
Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. Kaylene Larsen gives birth to beautiful twins from an in vitro procedure. But joy turns to fear when the unhinged egg donor comes to claim "her" babies (2017).
The Leak: Jack is determined to expose an intelligence leak after Myles is shot in an ambush during the team's search for a terrorist recruiter.

To Serge with Love: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
In Plane Sight: As Castle and Alexis travel to London, their routine flight hits some turbulence when the plane's Air Marshal is found murdered.
...Over Diamonds: Mystery starring Alexa PenaVega. When a priceless necklace vanishes, a savvy photographer and a seasoned detective join forces to crack the case. (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Over Diamonds: Mystery starring Alexa PenaVega. When a priceless necklace vanishes, a savvy photographer and a seasoned detective join forces to crack the case. (2020)
Malibu Fire: An environmentalist is suspected of starting a fire to prevent the building of a new development. But Dr Sloan and Steve investigate when the ecologist is killed.
Deadly Games: Dr Sloan investigates when a wealthy heiress is brought into Community General after an attempt is made on her life.
Shooting In Rome: Jessica travels to Rome to help with the film adaptation of one of her novels. But she soon finds herself investigating a murder scene when a member of the cast is killed.
Deadly Bidding: Jessica becomes embroiled in the New York art scene when she attempts to buy an alleged Sir Arthur Conan Doyle manuscript. Will a stolen painting ultimately lead to murder?
The Hunter: Sue enlists her colleagues to prove that a man imprisoned as a serial killer twenty years ago is innocent. Meanwhile, Jack is forced to discredit a lawsuit made against him.
Dead From New York: When the powerful creator of a long-running comedy sketch show is murdered, Castle and Beckett investigate and uncover a shocking secret.
Heartbreak: Carrie and Al are at a loss to explain how a murder victim mysteriously appeared in an empty ballpark.
Stan by Me: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. A crime fiction professor gets a taste of the real thing when a priceless lab specimen vanishes - and she's drawn into a case full of twists. (2019)

Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. After her neighbourhood is hit by a wave of break-ins, a nifty garage sale buyer turned amateur sleuth gets to work. (2013)
